title: glyceria fluitans var. pedicellata
intro: Glyceria fluitans var. pedicellata, also known as floating sweetgrass, is a type of aquatic grass that belongs to the Poaceae family. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it useful in treating wounds and skin conditions. The health benefits of Glyceria fluitans var. pedicellata include reducing inflammation, soothing skin irritations, and promoting wound healing. The plant can be prepared in various herbal forms, such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
